_fixture_meta.label: positive
_fixture_meta.notes: Triple-detector positive: D02 (LP not locked), D03 (top10 concentration high), D06 (mint authority + Signal B large mint event). Classic pre-rug setup: deployer holds LP + minted extra supply to own wallet + owns most of the tokens. D04/D05 not firing — no pump or wash detected yet. Tests that three detectors can fire independently without inflating each other's confidence.

d01_honeypot.reason: No freeze_authority, no transfer_fee, no transfer_hook, no permanent_delegate.

d02_rug_pull.reason: Signal B: effective_safe=0.0% (0% burned, 0% locked). conf=0.75. Single LP provider (deployer): +0.05 -> 0.80. High. $78k at full rug risk.

d03_concentration.reason: Note: deployer wallet excluded from top10 exclusion logic? If deployer is excluded: top10_now=(168+122+88+62+44+28+18+9+6)e12/1200e12=545/1200=0.454. delta=0.454-0.68=-0.226 (decrease). But deployer holds 480/1200=40%. If deployer is NOT excluded (not classified as LP/known address): top10=(480+168+122+88+62+44+28+18+9+6)/1200=1025/1200=0.854>=0.80 -> Signal 3 fires. Signal 2: top10_now=0.854 vs prior=0.68. delta=0.174>=0.10 -> Signal 2 fires. conf_s2=min(1.0,0.50+0.174/0.10*0.25)=min(1.0,0.935)=0.935 Critical. Final: 0.935 Critical.
d03_concentration.calibration_note: Deployer wallet classification matters: is creator_balance excluded from top10 liquid exclusion? The prior snapshot supply=1000e12, now=1200e12 (after mint event). The top10_pct_liquid_after_exclusion in prior may exclude deployer. Current approach: include deployer in top10 if they hold liquid (non-LP) tokens. Sprint 5: document exclusion logic for creator wallets in D03.

d06_mint_burn_anomaly.reason: Signal B: single mint of 200e12 to DevTripleR099 (non-LP). pct=200e12/1000e12=20%>=5%. conf=min(0.85, 0.55+(0.20-0.05)/0.05*0.30+0.30)=min(0.85,0.55+0.90+0.30)=min(0.85,1.75)=0.85. Signal A: mint_authority active, age=12d>7d, conf=0.20 (subsumed by Signal B at 0.85). Signal C: token_age=12d<14d -> Signal C does not apply. Final D06: 0.85 Critical. Note: prior supply was 1000e12, now 1200e12, confirming 200e12 minted.
